default_count.hint: The bundled dice app supports 1 to 6 dice.

max_count.description: Maximum dice count accepted by commands
max_count.hint: Values above 6 are capped because the bundled UI only supports up to 6 dice.

browser.description: Optional Chromium, Chrome, or Edge executable path
browser.hint: Leave empty to auto-detect from common paths and browser-related environment variables.

auto_install_chromium.description: Auto-install Playwright Chromium when no browser is found
auto_install_chromium.hint: AstrBot installs Python packages from requirements.txt. This option also runs python -m playwright install chromium when the browser binary is missing.

better_render_quality.description: Wait for the full 3D scene before recording the GIF
better_render_quality.hint: When enabled, the renderer waits for the original page to finish drawing, then clicks the Roll button and records from that stable scene.

width.description: Browser viewport width used for rendering

height.description: Browser viewport height used for rendering
